objective: Build the Jetson Orin NX backend support entry table for VPI operators, GStreamer hardware codec plugins, and power-mode availability before choosing the next acceleration module.

allowed: This probe records backend/API readiness on the current Jetson environment
This probe identifies candidate modules for later before-after timing
forbidden: This probe proves full EIS acceleration
A failed minimal backend probe means the entire acceleration track should stop
A plugin/API presence result is a performance speedup

recovery_actions.jetson_ssh_auth_blocker: Ask user for current Jetson password or key setup; do not treat this as a VPI blocker.
recovery_actions.vpi_import_failed: Record environment gap and check installed JetPack/VPI packages before changing system packages.
recovery_actions.operator_probe_failed: Use docs/knowledge_base/routing.md public:nvidia_vpi_samples to classify API, format, or backend mismatch.

reporting_policy: Summarize core progress in the chat from evidence files; do not create a standalone progress-summary Markdown document unless the user asks.
